spec.rawSql:
SELECT count() AS "Total Requests"
FROM default.RequestLogs
WHERE RequestTime >= $__fromTime AND RequestTime <= $__toTime
AND Model LIKE '%${Model}%'
AND IP LIKE '%${IP}%'
AND ApiKeyName LIKE '%${ApiKeyName}%'

SELECT
  count() / dateDiff('second', $__fromTime, $__toTime) AS "Average QPS"
FROM default.RequestLogs
WHERE RequestTime >= $__fromTime AND RequestTime <= $__toTime
AND Model LIKE '%${Model}%'
AND IP LIKE '%${IP}%'
AND ApiKeyName LIKE '%${ApiKeyName}%'

SELECT
  sum(Success) / count() * 100 AS "Success Rate"
FROM default.RequestLogs
WHERE RequestTime >= $__fromTime AND RequestTime <= $__toTime
AND Model LIKE '%${Model}%'
AND IP LIKE '%${IP}%'
AND ApiKeyName LIKE '%${ApiKeyName}%'

SELECT
  avg(Duration) AS "Average Latency"
FROM default.RequestLogs
WHERE RequestTime >= $__fromTime AND RequestTime <= $__toTime
AND Success = 1
AND Model LIKE '%${Model}%'
AND IP LIKE '%${IP}%'
AND ApiKeyName LIKE '%${ApiKeyName}%'

SELECT
  quantile(0.95)(Duration) AS "P95 Latency"
FROM default.RequestLogs
WHERE RequestTime >= $__fromTime AND RequestTime <= $__toTime
AND Success = 1
AND Model LIKE '%${Model}%'
AND IP LIKE '%${IP}%'
AND ApiKeyName LIKE '%${ApiKeyName}%'

SELECT 
  sum(lengthUTF8(LastQuestion)) AS "Total Question Length"
FROM default.RequestLogs
WHERE (RequestTime >= $__fromTime AND RequestTime <= $__toTime)
AND Model LIKE '%${Model}%'
AND IP LIKE '%${IP}%'


AND ApiKeyName LIKE '%${ApiKeyName}%'

SELECT 
  sum(lengthUTF8(Answer)) AS "Total Answer Length"
FROM default.RequestLogs
WHERE (RequestTime >= $__fromTime AND RequestTime <= $__toTime)
AND Model LIKE '%${Model}%'
AND IP LIKE '%${IP}%'


AND ApiKeyName LIKE '%${ApiKeyName}%'

SELECT
  $__timeInterval(RequestTime) as "time",
  avg(Duration) as "Avg Latency",
  quantile(0.95)(Duration) as "P95 Latency"
FROM default.RequestLogs
WHERE (RequestTime >= $__fromTime AND RequestTime <= $__toTime)
AND Success = 1
AND Model LIKE '%${Model}%'
AND IP LIKE '%${IP}%'
GROUP BY time

AND ApiKeyName LIKE '%${ApiKeyName}%'
ORDER BY time

SELECT 
  $__timeInterval(RequestTime) as "time",
  sum(lengthUTF8(LastQuestion)) AS "Total Question Length"
FROM default.RequestLogs
WHERE (RequestTime >= $__fromTime AND RequestTime <= $__toTime)
AND Model LIKE '%${Model}%'
AND IP LIKE '%${IP}%'
GROUP BY time

AND ApiKeyName LIKE '%${ApiKeyName}%'
ORDER BY time

SELECT 
  $__timeInterval(RequestTime) as "time",
  sum(lengthUTF8(Answer)) AS "Total Answer Length"
FROM default.RequestLogs
WHERE (RequestTime >= $__fromTime AND RequestTime <= $__toTime)
AND Model LIKE '%${Model}%'
AND IP LIKE '%${IP}%'
GROUP BY time

AND ApiKeyName LIKE '%${ApiKeyName}%'
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  $__timeInterval(RequestTime) as "time",
  count() / $__interval_s as "QPS (Requests/sec)"
FROM default.RequestLogs
WHERE (RequestTime >= $__fromTime AND RequestTime <= $__toTime)
AND Model LIKE '%${Model}%'
AND IP LIKE '%${IP}%'
GROUP BY time

AND ApiKeyName LIKE '%${ApiKeyName}%'
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  $__timeInterval(RequestTime) as "time",
  count() / $__interval_s as "QPS (Requests/sec)"
FROM default.RequestLogs
WHERE (RequestTime >= $__fromTime AND RequestTime <= $__toTime)
AND Model LIKE '%${Model}%'
AND IP LIKE '%${IP}%'
GROUP BY time

AND ApiKeyName LIKE '%${ApiKeyName}%'
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  Model,
  count() as requests
FROM default.RequestLogs
WHERE (RequestTime >= $__fromTime AND RequestTime <= $__toTime)
AND IP LIKE '%${IP}%'
GROUP BY Model

AND ApiKeyName LIKE '%${ApiKeyName}%'
ORDER BY requests DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT
  toString(StatusCode) as Status,
  count() as count
FROM default.RequestLogs
WHERE (RequestTime >= $__fromTime AND RequestTime <= $__toTime)
AND Model LIKE '%${Model}%'
AND IP LIKE '%${IP}%'
GROUP BY Status

AND ApiKeyName LIKE '%${ApiKeyName}%'
ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT
  IP,
  count() as Requests
FROM default.RequestLogs
WHERE (RequestTime >= $__fromTime AND RequestTime <= $__toTime)
AND Model LIKE '%${Model}%'
GROUP BY IP

AND ApiKeyName LIKE '%${ApiKeyName}%'
ORDER BY Requests DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT *
FROM default.RequestLogs
WHERE RequestTime >= $__fromTime AND RequestTime <= $__toTime
AND Model LIKE '%${Model}%'
AND IP LIKE '%${IP}%'
AND ApiKeyName LIKE '%${ApiKeyName}%'

SELECT
  RequestTime,
  IP,
  Model,
  StatusCode,
  Duration,
  LastQuestion,
  TraceId
FROM default.RequestLogs
WHERE (RequestTime >= $__fromTime AND RequestTime <= $__toTime)
AND Success = 0
AND Model LIKE '%${Model}%'
AND IP LIKE '%${IP}%'

AND ApiKeyName LIKE '%${ApiKeyName}%'
ORDER BY RequestTime DESC
LIMIT 50

SELECT
  $__timeInterval(RequestTime) as "time",
  ApiKeyName,
  count() as "Requests"
FROM default.RequestLogs
WHERE (RequestTime >= $__fromTime AND RequestTime <= $__toTime)
AND Model LIKE '%${Model}%'
AND IP LIKE '%${IP}%'
AND ApiKeyName LIKE '%${ApiKeyName}%'
GROUP BY time, ApiKeyName
ORDER BY time

spec.description: Stacked bar chart showing API call count over time, split by API key. Use the Model and API Key dropdowns to filter.
spec.title: API Key Usage Over Time
